# Diyama Solutions

> Diyama Solutions is a business growth consultancy based in Lusaka, Zambia, serving businesses across Africa. We combine marketing, strategy, branding, web development, and consulting with a suite of free, ready to use business apps. Our promise: bring the challenge, we will help you move.

Diyama helps entrepreneurs, SMEs, and established companies get found online, win customers, and run their operations with less friction. We practise what we advise: the same growth systems and software we build for clients, we run and offer ourselves.

## Services
- [All services](https://www.diyama.online/services): 20 services across Marketing & Growth, Strategy & Consulting, Creative & Content, Digital & Tech, Industry Specific, and Web3. Includes digital marketing, social media management, growth strategy, branding, web development, SEO, content, and more.
- [Book a consultation](https://www.diyama.online/consultations): Start with a focused session to map your next 90 days.
- [Diyama AI advisor](https://www.diyama.online/ai): A free AI business advisor, available 24/7, no signup.
- [Business Fit generator](https://www.diyama.online/business-fit): Answer a few questions and get a free personalized business kit with recommendations, quick wins, and next steps.

## Free business apps (try instantly, no signup)
- [Diyama Invoicer](https://www.diyama.online/apps/invoicer): Create professional invoices and download branded PDFs.
- [Diyama QR Studio](https://www.diyama.online/apps/qr-studio): Generate QR codes for links, WhatsApp, WiFi, and contact cards.
- [Diyama Quote Builder](https://www.diyama.online/apps/quotation): Build and download professional quotations.
- [Diyama BookMe](https://www.diyama.online/apps/bookme): Take appointments with automatic time slots and WhatsApp confirmations.
- [Diyama BioLink](https://www.diyama.online/apps/biolink): Build a shareable link in bio page for your business.
- [Diyama PaySlip](https://www.diyama.online/apps/payslip): Calculate Zambian PAYE, NAPSA, and NHIMA and download payslips.
- [Diyama StockTrack](https://www.diyama.online/apps/stocktrack): Track inventory with low stock alerts and stock value.
- [Diyama Expensa](https://www.diyama.online/apps/expensa): Track income and expenses with live charts.
- [Diyama TapCard](https://www.diyama.online/apps/tapcard): Create a digital business card with a QR code and vCard.
- [Diyama Loyalty](https://www.diyama.online/apps/loyalty): Run digital loyalty stamp cards for your shop or cafe.

## Learn
- [Learn hub](https://www.diyama.online/learn): Free, practical guides for African business owners on marketing, growth, tourism, restaurants, the creator economy, and more.
